title: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Youth Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Youth Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LINES FOR LIFE YOUTHLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis intervention line. Additionally provides support and referrals around such topics as dealing with bad test grades, running away from home, homelessness, a recent breakup, depression, anxiety, bullying, pregnancy, self-harm, or substance use disorders. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Youth ages 10-24 and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (877) 968-8491 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to children experiencing a mental health crisis. Program crisis workers can provide assistance and referrals to help stabilize the situation, and create a short-term plan. On-site services available for more intensive intervention needs. The team may seek authorization for a brief, voluntary crisis care placement, approved by the parent. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Families with youth age 20 and younger who are experiencing a mental health crisis Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 989-9990 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINES FOR LIFE YOUTHLINE RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES
